nasb.text: Then my enemy will see, And shame will cover her who said to me, “Where is the Lord your God?” My eyes will look on her; At that time she will be trampled down Like mire of the streets.

esv.text: Then my enemy will see, and shame will cover her who said to me, “Where is the Lord your God?” My eyes will look upon her; now she will be trampled down like the mire of the streets.

cnv.text: 我的仇敵看見了， 就必蒙羞，就是那曾經對我說： “耶和華你的　神在哪裡”的人， 我必親眼看見他遭報； 那時，他必被人踐踏， 好像街上的泥土。

ccb.text: 从前嘲笑我说“你的上帝耶和华在哪里”的仇敌看见这事， 都必满面羞愧。 我必亲眼看见他们遭到报应， 他们要像街上的泥土一样被人践踏。
